Summary: Pre-Production Testing — MediFlow v2 v1 Launch
Description: Verify every patient and doctor flow across web and mobile plus security payments video messaging email and ops readiness; sign off against launch exit criteria before production deploy. Full detail in docs/qa/PreProductionTestPlan.md.

Summary: Email-OTP login signup-on-first-login and logout (Web)
Description: New email auto-provisions as patient; role landing correct; logout fully clears session. See plan MFQA-10.

Summary: Doctor clinic sign-in gate and role routing (Web)
Description: Only role=doctor admitted at /doctor/login; patient blocked; / routes by role. See plan MFQA-11.

Summary: Google sign-in optional provider (Web)
Description: Google button appears when GOOGLE_* set and completes OAuth; hidden when unset. See plan MFQA-12.

Summary: Unauthenticated API rejection (401) across protected routes
Description: Every protected endpoint rejects anonymous with 401 no leakage. See plan MFQA-20.

Summary: Doctor-only routes reject patients (403) and patient IDOR protection
Description: Patient cannot reach doctor routes (403) or read/mutate another patient resource. See plan MFQA-21.

Summary: Input validation on booking follow-up refill payloads (400)
Description: Malformed payloads rejected 400 (zod) no row written. See plan MFQA-22.

Summary: Realtime socket token HMAC validity expiry refresh CORS
Description: 15-min HMAC tokens verify/reject/refresh; browser Origin gated native exempt. See plan MFQA-23.

Summary: Production env safety audit check:env:strict and CRON_SECRET
Description: Strict env audit passes; reminder endpoint 401 without secret 200 with it. See plan MFQA-24.

Summary: Doctor profile setup (specialty bio fee slot-length timezone)
Description: Profile auto-provisions; fee (paise) slot length timezone persist and drive slots/receipts. See plan MFQA-30.

Summary: Weekly availability rules plus overrides drive live slot computation
Description: Slots computed at query time from rules minus overrides minus bookings; block removes extra adds. See plan MFQA-31.

Summary: Doctor week schedule view (availability plus bookings)
Description: /doctor/schedule places bookings in correct day/time. See plan MFQA-32.

Summary: Booking intake visit-reason symptoms report-upload triage consent
Description: Intake captures reason/symptoms optional report; red-flag triage; consent required version server-stamped. See plan MFQA-40.

Summary: Slot hold 10-min expiry and refresh-safe resume
Description: Slot held 10 min; ?appointment resume; expiry 410 restart at intake frees slot. See plan MFQA-41.

Summary: Payment mock Razorpay Checkout signature-verify webhook-authoritative
Description: Razorpay popup opens; signature verified; webhook authoritative even if tab closed; failure no confirm. See plan MFQA-42.

Summary: Double-booking concurrency exactly one of two racing bookings wins
Description: uq_appointments_doctor_slot final guard; loser 409; expired holds cancelled pre-insert. See plan MFQA-43.

Summary: Booking confirmation plus email plus resume summary
Description: Confirmation summary correct; confirmation email sent (Resend/console). See plan MFQA-44.

Summary: Patient appointment list detail cancel(2h) reschedule receipt
Description: List/detail; cancel only >=2h; reschedule via slot dialog; printable receipt. See plan MFQA-45.

Summary: Call join window pre-join device-check token authorization (Web both ends)
Description: Join 10min early 30min late; participant+status gated token; two-way media two devices; unconfigured 503. See plan MFQA-46.

Summary: Encounter SOAP autosave plus returning-patient history
Description: SOAP debounced autosave flush on tab-hide; history panel + badge scoped to patient. See plan MFQA-47.

Summary: Prescription draft to issue locks forever edit-after-issue 409
Description: Draft then issue locks permanently behind confirm; later edit 409; patient sees issued Rx. See plan MFQA-48.

Summary: Outcome mark completed / no-show with safety confirms
Description: Irreversible outcomes need confirm; no-show separated; patient label mapping (Missed vs No-show). See plan MFQA-49.

Summary: Patient prescriptions list and permanence
Description: All issued Rx listed permanently with detail. See plan MFQA-50.

Summary: Refill requests patient create (no dup pending) doctor fulfil/decline
Description: Refill request no duplicate pending; doctor fulfils via async consult or declines. See plan MFQA-51.

Summary: Follow-ups doctor recommends only owning patient acts inDays validated
Description: Doctor recommends follow-up; only owner acts; out-of-range inDays 400. See plan MFQA-52.

Summary: Doctor work queue and patient roster/record
Description: Work queue categories+counts; roster search/needs-attention filter; patient record panels. See plan MFQA-53.

Summary: Care checkout and activation (mock) configurable price status
Description: Doctor-set price shown; mock checkout activates 1-month period; status card + unlocks reflect. See plan MFQA-60.

Summary: Care cancellation pro-rated deduction/refund breakdown
Description: Pro-rated breakdown used non-refundable remainder refunded (7 working days) UI==server. See plan MFQA-61.

Summary: Care follow-up credit one per period doctor fulfil/dismiss
Description: Exactly one monthly follow-up credit; second in-period blocked; doctor fulfils. See plan MFQA-62.

Summary: Doctor Care management count members admin-toggle badges
Description: /doctor/care count+members+toggle; subscriber badge across detail list messages. See plan MFQA-63.

Summary: Messaging gate active Care subscription only (paid consult does not unlock)
Description: Only active subscriber can message; paid consult alone does not; expired period revokes. See plan MFQA-70.

Summary: Messaging send/receive pagination read-receipts unread counters
Description: REST-persisted; page size 30 cursor; recipient unread increments; open clears + stamps read. See plan MFQA-71.

Summary: Messaging attachments bound to conversation plus uploader (IDOR)
Description: Attachment only usable by uploader in its own conversation; leaked id cannot read others file. See plan MFQA-72.

Summary: Realtime live delivery token-refresh REST fallback when socket down
Description: Socket live delivery via LISTEN/NOTIFY; REST fallback on socket down; reconnect refresh. See plan MFQA-73.

Summary: Transactional email OTP booking-confirmation reminder-cron
Description: OTP+confirmation+reminder deliver via Resend; cron protected by CRON_SECRET; console fallback in dev. See plan MFQA-80.

Summary: Medical report upload plus participant-aware download authorization
Description: Upload PDF/JPEG/PNG; only owner patient or appointment doctor downloads; wrong-type/oversize rejected. See plan MFQA-81.

Summary: Mobile auth plus role routing (Expo Go)
Description: OTP login+verify SecureStore session role tab routing; cookie fetch to LAN dev server. See plan MFQA-90.

Summary: Mobile patient flows (Expo Go) full set
Description: Home book(mock-pay) appts reschedule/cancel prescriptions profile receipt settings Care mirror web. See plan MFQA-91.

Summary: Mobile doctor flows (Expo Go) full set
Description: Dashboard appts encounter/SOAP/Rx patients schedule work-queue refills Care settings on device. See plan MFQA-92.

Summary: Mobile messaging/chat (Expo Go)
Description: Care-gated chat live delivery pagination PDF open read state; non-subscriber locked; REST fallback. See plan MFQA-93.

Summary: Mobile native Razorpay Checkout (EAS dev build) BLOCKED until build
Description: Real Razorpay sheet completes booking in native build; not in Expo Go. Blocked without EAS build. See plan MFQA-94.

Summary: Mobile native LiveKit video media (EAS dev build) BLOCKED until build
Description: Native LiveKit two-way media in native build; Expo Go reaches token+pre-join only. Blocked without EAS build. See plan MFQA-95.

Summary: Loading skeletons error/empty states toasts reduced-motion boot-loader
Description: Every (app) route skeleton; async feedback toasts; reduced-motion respected; empty/error render. See plan MFQA-100.

Summary: Design-system conformance vs docs/Design.md web+mobile parity
Description: Fonts colors (cobalt/violet no teal) spacing glass/motion match Design.md; deviations S4/S5 bugs. See plan MFQA-101.

Summary: [Payments] Verify webhook idempotent under duplicate payment.captured
Description: Verification placeholder: replayed webhook must not double-confirm/charge. Link MFQA-42. Close if not reproduced.

Summary: [Booking] Expired-hold lazy-cancel leaves no orphan pending_payment row
Description: Verification placeholder: confirm no orphan rows after hold expiry+lazy cancel. Link MFQA-41/43.

Summary: [Messaging] Deactivating Care mid-conversation revokes thread access immediately
Description: Verification placeholder: deactivate Care then confirm thread inaccessible. Link MFQA-70.

Summary: [Deployment] Execute production deploy per docs/Deployment.md
Description: Neon+db:push; Vercel env all keys no local URLs; live LiveKit/Razorpay/Resend; register webhook; domain+BETTER_AUTH_URL; check:env:strict.

Summary: [Deployment] Doctor seed / promote in production
Description: Doctor signs in once then promote-doctor; set fee/slot/timezone+availability. Blocks real bookings.

Summary: [Deployment] Host realtime chat server and wire NEXT_PUBLIC_REALTIME_URL
Description: Deploy realtime/server.ts to persistent Node host with shared REALTIME_SECRET port origins; TLS to wss; verify GET / = realtime ok.

Summary: [Messaging] Add realtime socket-delivery E2E coverage
Description: Only unit coverage today; add e2e asserting live cross-client delivery + REST fallback.

Summary: [Care] Decide and implement refund-on-cancellation policy for consultations
Description: Consultation refund-on-cancel is policy-undecided/not built; decide then implement or document deferral. (Care-plan refund already done.)

Summary: [Mobile] Produce EAS development build for native payment + LiveKit testing
Description: Unblocks MFQA-94 (native Razorpay) and MFQA-95 (native LiveKit media).

Summary: [Notifications] Confirm production scheduler invokes /api/cron/reminders
Description: vercel.json declares 10-min cron; verify it runs with CRON_SECRET and a real reminder fires post-deploy.

Summary: [Care] Weekly Care digest email (Resend) build assembler + cron
Description: Deferred/not built; track for post-launch.

Summary: [Mobile] Push notifications for new messages (expo-notifications)
Description: Not implemented; chat only updates while open; track post-launch.

Summary: [Ops] Object-storage plan for report + chat-attachment bytea growth
Description: Reports+attachments stored inline as bytea; document S3/R2 swap trigger (isolated in reports.ts + routes).
